body.title: CC walk: Igor exempts Calibre from no-sqlite audit check
body.result: Target T-audit-sqlite-exempt-calibre already DONE — Calibre's learner.py added to LEGITIMATE_EXTERNAL in audit_check_sqlite_imports.py. Walk admin close.
body.description:
Target: T-audit-sqlite-exempt-calibre. Worker is 'claude' on target — reassign to igor or implement directly. Touches audit_runner.py or audit check def.

Checklist:
1. Check if reassigning to igor or implementing directly is faster
2. If implementing directly: read audit_runner.py, find no-sqlite-imports check, add exemption for learner.py:sqlite3 (Calibre read)
3. Run audit_runner --drain, verify PASS
4. Commit + close T-audit-sqlite-exempt-calibre
5. Close this walk ticket

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/audit_runner.py (or audit checks db)
**Design rules:** none
**Scope boundary:** IN — exempt calibre sqlite3 import
**Test plan:** audit_runner --drain shows no-sqlite-imports PASS.
